policy.summary: Public methods on the listed surfaces must be fully annotated. Any is allowed only at explicitly documented compatibility or payload-extension boundaries.
policy.new_public_method_rule: A new method on a listed public surface is scanned automatically and must not introduce missing annotations or Any unless a matching any_allowlist entry with owner, reason, and narrowing plan is added in the same change.

any_allowlist.reason: Existing public compatibility boundary accepts provider-, prompt-, output-, or host-defined payload shapes that are not yet represented by a narrower public type.
any_allowlist.narrowing_plan: Replace with a named TypedDict, Protocol, TypeAlias, or generic result type when this boundary is next changed; do not add new Any positions without a separate entry.
